scripts.host-prep: if (Test-Path host) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force host }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path host; Copy-Item -Recurse .next/standalone/* host/; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path host/public; Copy-Item -Recurse public/* host/public/; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path host/.next/static; Copy-Item -Recurse .next/static/* host/.next/static/
